article.title: Así está el Córdoba CF en la clasificación tras la dura derrota ante el Burgos

ideological_bias_framing.notes: Pure sports journalism covering football results and league standings. No political or ideological content detected.

tone_dimensions.notes: Uses somewhat dramatic language ('dura derrota', 'cócket explosivo', 'no demostró tener el honor suficiente') to describe the loss, but remains within typical sports reporting conventions.

emotional_appeals: Uses 'honor suficiente' to frame the team's mental approach as insufficient
crisis_framing: Frames the situation as a 'crisis of defeats'
numerical_context: Provides full 22-team league table as framing device
gap_analysis: Emphasizes distance from play-off (8 points) vs descent (10 points)

parsed_json.rationale: Standard sports match report focused on Córdoba CF's league position after a loss to Burgos. The article includes opinionated framing regarding the team's mental effort ('honor') and uses somewhat dramatic descriptors ('cócket explosivo', 'dura derrota'). No ideological or political content. Language is typical of Spanish sports journalism covering football results.
evidence_spans: El equipo blanquiverde no demostró tener el honor suficiente para superar la crisis de derrotas que atravesaba
pasividad defensiva y la inoperancia en ataque fueron un cócket explosivo
Tras este resultado, el Córdoba se mantiene [...] en la duodécima posición con 41 puntos
el equipo blanquiverde se encuentra a ocho puntos del play off y a diez del descenso
parsed_json.outlet_notes: ABC is a center-right to conservative Spanish newspaper. However, this specific article is apolitical sports content with no detectable ideological framing.
